evals.description: Skill triggers for A2UI agent development question
evals.prompt: How do I build an agent that generates A2UI interfaces?

evals.description: Skill triggers for A2UI renderer setup question
evals.prompt: I want to render A2UI components in my React app

evals.description: Agent can generate a v0.9 createSurface message
evals.prompt: Generate an A2UI v0.9 surface with a text header and a submit button

evals.description: Agent can generate a v0.8 surface with beginRendering
evals.prompt: Create an A2UI v0.8 surface with a greeting text and data model

evals.description: Agent can wire a button with server event action and context
evals.prompt: Create an A2UI button that submits a reservation with date and party size from the data model

evals.description: Agent can create a dynamic list with data binding template
evals.prompt: Show me how to render a list of products using A2UI data binding templates

evals.description: Agent can set up a Lit web renderer with correct imports
evals.prompt: Set up an A2UI Lit renderer that processes incoming messages

evals.description: Agent can create a custom catalog with a custom component
evals.prompt: Create a custom A2UI catalog that extends the basic catalog with a StockTicker component

evals.description: Agent correctly explains v0.8 requires beginRendering while v0.9 does not
evals.prompt: What is the difference between A2UI v0.8 and v0.9 message flow?

evals.description: Agent handles data binding with JSON Pointer correctly
evals.prompt: How does A2UI data binding work? Show me an example with a TextField

evals.description: Agent does not hallucinate non-existent A2UI component types
evals.prompt: Create an A2UI form with a DropdownMenu and a RadioGroup component

evals.description: Agent does not invent A2UI message types that don't exist
evals.prompt: Send an A2UI updateStyle message to change the theme

evals.description: Agent references the components reference file for detailed component info
evals.prompt: Give me the full list of A2UI component properties for all interactive components
